rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND JEW TSANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required to explain why there is still no verification to the petition and no proof of service. in addition, Counsel should be prepared to explain why the amended inventory does not include the Vanguard IRA, valued at $55,248.04 on the original I & A. Counsel should not send anyone else in his place unless that attorney is fully briefed on the case and issues and is prepared to respond to the Judge's questions in full.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF REBECCA SUBIDO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the co-executors deposited all funds into an attorney client trust account rather than an interest bearing account, detailed schedules were not attached to support statutory fees computed on an amount other than the I&A, this Court does not ordinarily permit time entries in quarter-hour increments or allow fees for research, the attorneys' costs advanced did not itemize File & Serve Xpress fees in sufficient detail, and the filing fee for this petition was $435, not $495.
